implementation_summary.summary: CP00-645 is production_ready for the RP21 Admin Console scope/domain foundation over 150 planned units, preserving no-write, no-real-data, descriptor-only taxonomy, template, workflow, policy, usage, billing-plan, permission, audit, UI, Hermes, Claude review, and CP646 handoff boundaries without opening Admin Console runtime behavior.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-645 RP21.P00.M00.S01-RP21.P01.M08.S05 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
